data.body: Plan-review PASS (advisory=10, signed). Triage: (1) T5c/T11/E2/G4 have no ACs but ARE named deliverables in 'What' — implementing all 7 enrichments (faithful to the ticket; the missing ACs are a ticket-authoring gap, not a scope cut). (2) AC1 ('N patterns explicitly present in-prompt') has no grep proof — I enumerate each item explicitly/numbered in the target prompt so the completion-verifier can confirm by reading. (3) AC2 (git diff --name-only lists only reviewers/*.md) OVERRIDES the file_impact's mention of test_plan_review_evals.py: this WS is PROMPT-ONLY — no eval/test/schema edits. AC4 (recall incl R-E6-cutover-no-live-ac) is satisfied by that case already existing + the suite staying green after the reword. (4) T3 four-class is recorded via the T3 prompt's evidence[] wording only (sidecar _slim excludes evidence[] by design — persisting is a WS9-style follow-on, out of scope).
